notes: This web bundle is pre-aggregated from csv_full.
The raw line_lifecycle.csv is intentionally not loaded into the browser.
Semgrep and OSV-scanner finding aggregates are filtered to 2025-05-01T00:00:00+00:00 through 2026-05-31T23:59:59.999999+00:00.
Line-lifecycle visualizations exclude origin commits with at least 500,000 tracked lines.
Terminal maintenance-class counts are regenerated from csv_full/line_lifecycle.csv.
Static finding visualizations exclude commits with at least 500,000 changed lines.
OSV-scanner finding visualizations exclude blank/unknown severities.
